speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome! You've got a great eye for a fantastic deal. This 2019 Toyota RAV4 XLE is a one-owner gem with only 52,000 miles and all the bells and whistles like Toyota Safety Sense and a big touchscreen. It’s been meticulously maintained, comes with full service records, and is just itching to take you on your next adventure!

text: Welcome! You've got a great eye for a fantastic deal. speaker: buyer

args.message: Oh, what a lovely car! It certainly looks spiffy in the pictures. How does it feel to drive? Is it nice and smooth on the road?

text: Oh, what a lovely car! It certainly looks spiffy in the pictures. How does it feel to drive? Is it nice and smooth on the road?

speaker: seller

args.message: Oh, it drives like a dream, smooth as butter on a hot skillet! You can feel the Toyota engineering the second you get behind the wheel. It handles beautifully, no bumps or shakes, just pure driving pleasure. Honestly, it feels brand new, you won't be disappointed!

text: Oh, it drives like a dream, smooth as butter on a hot skillet! You can feel the Toyota engineering the second you get behind the wheel. It handles beautifully, no bumps or shakes, just pure driving pleasure. Honestly, it feels brand new, you won't be disappointed!

speaker: buyer

args.message: That sounds wonderful! I'm certainly looking for something reliable and smooth. I really like the look of it. I was hoping to keep my purchase around $25,000. Would you be willing to part with it for that?

text: That sounds wonderful! I'm certainly looking for something reliable and smooth. I really like the look of it. I was hoping to keep my purchase around $25,000. Would you be willing to part with it for that?

speaker: seller

args.message: Twenty-five thousand? That's a bit lower than I was hoping for, considering the condition and mileage on this one. It's a one-owner XLE with full records, and these RAV4s hold their value like gold. How about we meet in the middle at $27,000? I can tell you, I saw a similar model go for more at auction just last week!

text: Twenty-five thousand? That's a bit lower than I was hoping for, considering the condition and mileage on this one. speaker: buyer

args.reason: Oh, my goodness, that's still a bit more than I can stretch to right now. I really do appreciate you coming down a bit, but my budget just can't quite get to $27,000. I'm afraid I'll have to keep looking.
